topFindings: bug_startrun_returns_ok_screen_stays_hub (p1) — startRun() reports success but Hub never transitions; required __rrScenario.spawn workaround
bug_selectmapnode_returns_ok_no_transition (p1) — selectMapNode silently no-ops with ok:true on a node the DOM marks state-available but the run-state cannot enter
bug_combatscene_teardown_atmosphere_undefined (p2) — atmosphereSystem.resetStreak called after destroy; CombatScene.ts:2311; pollutes console after every combat
balance_floor1_room2_hp_burn_steep (p3) — Index Weaver took player 86→47 HP in 4 turns on floor 1 room 2

criteria: Only active issues that can break room, encounter, reward-room, floor, or run progression remain on this board.
Resolved findings are removed from the active list after a fixing change and targeted verification.
Non-blocking polish, local Docker/browser noise, copy clarity, and future balance discussion are not counted as publishing blockers.

triage.notes: __rrPlay.acceptReward() no longer drives reward collection through brittle pointer/canvas simulation; canvas screenshot failures are contained.
scripts/build-facts-db.mjs strips numeric {N} answer markers from public/facts.db and ignored data/seed-pack.json output.
Only the two launch-critical combat tutorial steps are active; the queued combat/HUD tour is kept out of the launch tutorial path.
Balance/readability concern, not a progression blocker.
Economy tuning concern, not a progression blocker.
Retreat/Delve copy now includes the delve upside and clearer death-retention wording.
Merged into the Retreat/Delve copy fix.
Docker/SwiftShader local performance observation, not launch progression breakage.
Offline/local backend console noise; game remains locally playable.
Run-end explanation polish, not a publishing blocker.
Adapt text now reads as a concrete Attack/Block/Cleanse transform.
BATCH-2026-05-04-003 targeted lethal-damage repro routed to runEnd, and the follow-up full-run bug hunt ended on runEnd with no active blockers.
selectMysteryChoice now handles EventQuiz controls and shopLeave confirms the leave modal; these were bridge gaps, not confirmed player-facing blockers.
BATCH-2026-05-04-004 saw a shield quick-play fail on a Phaser setFillStyle visual path; card, chain, and victory visuals are now best-effort and the post-fix Docker run completed to runEnd.
The bell pepper Scoville fact had answer 0 and no distractors, yielding a one-choice quiz; plain numeric zero answers now receive generated distractors.
BATCH-2026-05-04-005 reproduced combat victory leaving screen=combat with activeTurnState=null; turbo/bot mode now bypasses the parallax exit gate and calls onCombatExitComplete() directly.
TutorialCoachMark now tolerates a missing anchor object; post-fix BATCH-2026-05-04-005 debug errors no longer showed the null target exception.

BATCH-2026-05-04-006 reproduced the Steam-style reward Continue drawImage/black-field break using real clicks. Reward mouse clicks now go through the Phaser flow, bridge completion is guarded, and targeted verification advanced out of rewardRoom with no recent runtime errors.
The Charge hint banner no longer intercepts the second tap on selected cards; its close button remains clickable.
DomainStripCard now provides domain-card-* test IDs expected by the playtest API and e2e tests.
